mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TF_NOTIFICATION( ID, USER_ID, TYPE, MESSAGE, LINK_URL, IS_READ, CREATED_AT ) VALUES( SEQ_TF_NOTIFICATION_PK.nextval, #{userId}, #{type}, #{message}, #{linkUrl}, #{isRead}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TF_NOTIFICATION SET USER_ID = #{userId}, TYPE = #{type}, MESSAGE = #{message}, LINK_URL = #{linkUrl}, IS_READ = #{isRead}, CREATED_AT = #{createdAt} WHERE ID = #{id}
